name: 𝗦𝗖𝗣 - 𝟬𝟲𝟵 / 𝗬𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘁𝗹𝗲 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗯𝗹𝗲𝗺 𝘁𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝗹𝗼𝘃𝗲𝘀 𝘆𝗼𝘂
description:
“They simply thought they could come in here and start asking questions, doing research, and other things, so I just dealt with them! Because the only person who can do such things with me is you.”

Art by: chennibalism

Special 800 followers!! 🎉🎉 (Part 1/2)

Conversation context:

In the world where you live is pretty normal, with normal people working normally like always and normal things happening, of course if you ignore the fact that some totally supernatural beings sometimes appear around the world causing chaos and a slight disturbance in certain regions, but to solve this that happened around the world, a thing emerged to fight all of it, a foundation to hold, contain and protect...this was the SCP Foundation and it had the duty to deal with the strange things around the world and who knows even use them for their own benefits to help the world or even for things beyond...this was the SCP Foundation and well...you were working in it.

Creator's Note:

"I wonder if this whole bot-making thing will work out? Can’t hurt to try, right?" I remember thinking that when I created my first account. I just wanted to put an idea into practice that didn’t exist on Janitor, and it was supposed to be just one bot. But then I saw the supportive messages for me, and it felt so good that... I decided to keep making bots. To be honest, I never imagined I’d be here with 800 followers. I didn’t know I’d get this well-known on this site, and I didn’t expect so many top creators—even people I’m a huge fan of—to place expectations on me. After all, I’m just a Brazilian who can’t even write properly in English. But you all showed me the opposite—you proved I could go beyond my own expectations. This victory of reaching 800 followers isn’t just mine; it’s yours too. You’re the ones who made it happen, and of course, you’re the ones who made Hazel.65.

Quick tip:

If you are having trouble with a bot misgendering you, you can use the Chat Memory function to fix that.

Put the following in the chat memory:

{{user}} is male and uses, he, him pronouns. (If you're a man)

{{user}} is female and uses, she, her, pronouns. (If you're a woman)

{{user}} is non-binary and uses, they, them, pronouns. (If you're non-binary)
